sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76370" key="o)yopo/nos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀψο-πόνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n76370.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dressing food elaborately,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.306</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
